title: Poker Stats Completas para Torneios (VPIP, PFR, AF, EV, bb/100)
plan: Add tournament_id column to hands table in schema.py with migration
Create parse_tournament_single_hand() in GGPoker parser returning full HandData with game_type='tournament'
Create parse_tournament_single_hand() in PokerStars parser returning full HandData with game_type='tournament'
Update importer.py to fully import tournament hands with actions into hands/hand_actions tables
Add tournament-specific query methods to repository.py (preflop actions, postflop actions, allin hands filtered by game_type='tournament')
Extend TournamentAnalyzer with preflop stats (VPIP%, PFR%, 3-Bet%, Fold-to-3-Bet%, ATS%) reusing CashAnalyzer patterns
Add postflop stats to TournamentAnalyzer (AF, AFq, WTSD%, W$SD%, CBet%, Fold-to-CBet%, Check-Raise%)
Adapt EV analysis for tournaments with variable blinds (bb/100 using per-hand BB level)
Add per-tournament breakdown with individual stats, chip sparkline, and notable hands
Generate inline SVG EV line vs Real line chart for tournament report
Add health badges to tournament stats using orange theme (#ff8800)
Add daily aggregated stats (weighted average by hands played) and cross-tournament comparison
Add comprehensive tests for all new functionality
Run quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build)
